profile.name: Mahatav Arora
profile.intro: I'm a freelance web developer who builds websites and online tools that help businesses look credible, get found on Google, and win more customers. I manage each project from the first conversation through to launch, keep the process clear and jargon-free, and deliver work that's reliable from day one and easy to build on.
profile.availability: Currently booking new website projects. Clear timelines, steady communication, and no jargon.

featured.title: Channeling Skinny Bob
featured.summary: A bold, cinematic website that turns a creator's archive into an immersive experience for their audience.
featured.description: I led this build from concept to launch: the visual direction, the full website, and a large, well-organized content library, along with a few hidden features for fans to discover.
highlights: Look and feel built from scratch

featured.title: TA Application System
featured.summary: A hiring tool that reads résumés automatically and helps the team shortlist the right candidates fast.
featured.description: I built a tool that scans applicant résumés, identifies each candidate's real skills, and lets the hiring team filter and shortlist in seconds instead of hours.

featured.title: Green Construction
featured.summary: A complete website rebuild for a university research centre, easy to update and easy to search.
featured.description: I redesigned and rebuilt the centre's website so their team can publish research, events, and updates themselves, without a developer. I also added a custom search and rebuilt their contact forms.
highlights: Staff can post their own updates

featured.title: AI Built From Scratch
featured.summary: I built my own version of the kind of AI that powers tools like ChatGPT, from the ground up.
featured.description: A from-scratch build of a language model, the technology behind today's AI tools. I wrote and tested every part myself, so I can apply AI to client work thoughtfully and with real understanding.

featured.title: OKGN Boat Rentals
featured.summary: A faster, clearer boat-rental website with simple online booking, built for the busy season.
featured.description: I rebuilt the entire website and added a straightforward booking system: choose a date and time, pick a boat, enter your details, and you're set. Built to handle peak-season traffic, rank locally, and keep spam out.

experiments.title: Self-Flying Drone That Follows People
experiments.summary: A drone that detects a person and flies itself to follow them, autonomously and in real time.

experiments.title: Camera Robot That Chases a Target
experiments.summary: A camera-equipped robot that locks onto a target and tracks it as it moves around the room.

experiments.title: Drone That Lands Itself
experiments.summary: A drone that locates its own landing pad and touches down without a pilot.

experiments.title: Banking Identity Checks
experiments.summary: Identity-verification experiments that detect faces and confirm a real person is present, the way banking apps do.

research.title: How AI Picks Up Bias
research.summary: A study of how AI absorbs bias from its training data, comparing two models trained on very different philosophical texts.
research.paperTitle: Corpus-Conditioned Bias: Training GPT-2 Models on Eastern and Western Philosophical Texts

research.title: Spotting Human vs. AI Code
research.summary: A tool that determines whether code was written by a person or by AI, used to study how student work is changing.
research.paperTitle: Pre-Post AI Comparisons: Behavioural Changes in Student Capstone Projects

research.title: How Software Teams Work
research.summary: A tool that analyzes how software teams collaborate, turning their day-to-day activity into clear, visual patterns.

research.title: Reading Jersey Numbers on TV
research.summary: A system that reads players' jersey numbers from broadcast soccer footage, even when the video is blurry or distant.
research.paperTitle: Jersey Number Recognition in Broadcast Soccer Video

packages.intro: Clear options shaped around what your business needs. Every website is built to be found on Google and ready to grow with you. After a short, no-pressure conversation, I'll prepare a quote tailored to your project.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.blurb: A clean, professional site built on the website builder of your choice, whether that's Squarespace, WordPress, or Wix. No custom design, just a fast, polished way to get your business online.
features: Set up on any website builder
Looks great on phones and tablets
Set up to show on Google

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.blurb: A custom website designed around your brand and built to turn visitors into customers. Designed and developed from scratch, never from a template.
features: A custom design, made just for you
Easy to update yourself, no code
Built to load fast and rank on Google
See how visitors find and use your site

tiers.name: Performance
tiers.blurb: Custom visuals, animation, and interactive features, plus bespoke tools and automation when your business needs them. Built for brands that want to stand out and scale.
features: Custom tools built around your business

seo.label: GETTING FOUND ON GOOGLE
seo.summary: Strong search visibility is built into everything I make, and I also offer it on its own, whether I built your site or not.
items: Find and fix what's hurting your ranking
Help you stand out in Google results
Show up in local searches and maps
Clear reports on how you're doing

faq.question: What kind of work do you take on?
faq.answer: Websites and online tools for businesses, from a clean, polished site to a custom build with online booking, customer accounts, or smart automation. If it lives online, I can build it.

faq.question: Do I need to understand the tech?
faq.answer: Not at all, that's my job. I handle the technical side and explain everything in plain English, so you can stay focused on running your business.

faq.question: Where are you based, and do you work remotely?
faq.answer: I'm based in Kelowna, BC, and work with clients anywhere. Everything can be handled remotely, on a schedule that suits you.

faq.question: Are you available for new work?
faq.answer: Yes. I'm currently booking new projects, and I'm reliable with timelines and communication throughout. The contact form below is the fastest way to start.
